title: Manik Charan
text: Home * People * Manik Charan Manik Charan , an Indian software developer [1] . He designed and implemented libchess , a C++ library for building chess software, contributed to python-chess , and is further author of the source chess engines WyldChess , Teki and Nirsyde , available on GitHub [2] .
